strategy.one_way: Every concrete public flag appears at least once; enumerated flags appear once per declared value.
strategy.pairwise: Interacting families are closed with explicit hazard clusters instead of a full cartesian explosion.

hazard_clusters.rationale: Mixed carrier and protocol advertisement must preserve listener resolution and TLS policy closure.
Protocol choice interacts with admission control and timeout semantics under overload.
RFC 7692 negotiation must stay aligned across HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, and HTTP/3 carriers.
CONNECT, trailers, and content coding must close independently across HTTP versions.
Development and process controls must not create invalid inherited-listener combinations.

phase9a_contract_freeze.definition_of_done: All blocking flags must preserve one-way coverage and the affected hazard-cluster coverage before Phase 9F can exit green.
